textByHash.f6cf98d3350de6f693584be0d68a9c52ecdb6b07: Oh dear, oh dear, I knew I had to do something!
textByHash.eb0ca6a9adf1a1d113357c1de72be7879252a38b: Pleashhh, find me a jug of water. Once I'm sober I'll 'elp you take the wine back.
textByHash.77d41063c59c328e674f78e68b2cb40790638df9: Hic up! Oh my head! I need a jug of water.
textByHash.a243a16e3d0a55473c1fd3ae700567519401c0b8: Now I just need to fix this cart and we can go party.
textByHash.a24c5a9c22eaaca790f2b7f77d1b6c18a3f9d47a: In that case I'd better drink more wine! It helps me think.
textByHash.fe95cbac546f464a49b1f76ba267137d6d78e7de: Excellent, I just need some wood. Some plain logs, or maybe a basic plank.
textByHash.231c94e65a78cbb77f458949358c89c9d55a2ff3: Did you manage to get some wood?
textByHash.33c0e7e6e0ed179afbf2396b4f9618702d7dfccb: Well done! Now I'll fix this cart. You head back to Brother Omad and tell him I'll be there soon.
textByHash.dee5145dae25efa3347deda54a29d0f462842d9e: Hi, I'm almost done here. Could you tell Omad that I'll be back soon?
textByHash.8452bc4acc05812b1ed13393c5c9519dbe28f8e2: Brother Omad sends you his thanks! He won't be in a fit state to thank you in person.
